# Divider Component Documentation

A visual separator that divides content sections. Supports horizontal and vertical orientations with an optional centered label.

## Component API

### Props

- `orientation: 'horizontal' | 'vertical'` — Separator axis (default: `'horizontal'`)
- `label?: string` — Optional text displayed in the center of the divider
- `class?: string` — Additional CSS classes on the root element

## DOM Structure

```html
<!-- Horizontal (no label) -->
<div data-divider data-orientation="horizontal" role="separator" aria-orientation="horizontal"></div>

<!-- Horizontal with label -->
<div data-divider data-orientation="horizontal" role="separator" aria-orientation="horizontal">
  <span data-divider-label>OR</span>
</div>

<!-- Vertical -->
<div data-divider data-orientation="vertical" role="separator" aria-orientation="vertical"></div>
```

## Usage Examples

### Basic Horizontal

```svelte
<script>
  import { Divider } from '@rokkit/ui'
</script>

<p>Section A</p>
<Divider />
<p>Section B</p>
```

### With Label

```svelte
<Divider label="OR" />
<Divider label="SECTION BREAK" />
```

### Vertical

Place inside a flex row container:

```svelte
<div class="flex h-12 items-center gap-4">
  <span>Left</span>
  <Divider orientation="vertical" />
  <span>Right</span>
</div>
```

## Styling Hooks

- `[data-divider]` — Root element
- `[data-divider][data-orientation='horizontal']` — Horizontal variant
- `[data-divider][data-orientation='vertical']` — Vertical variant
- `[data-divider-label]` — Center label span (only present when label prop is set)

Theme colors come from `[data-style='rokkit']` ancestor and use the `surface-z4` token for the line color and `surface-z6` for the label text.
